channel.title: bash-history on geobour98
channel.description: Recent content in bash-history on geobour98

item.title: TryHackMe - Hacker vs. Hacker
item.description: Introduction This is a TryHackMe room which can be found at: Hacker vs. Hacker Someone has compromised this server already! Can you get in and evade their countermeasures? Reconnaissance & Scanning Perform nmap scan to identify open ports and services. Command: nmap -p- -T4 -v 10.10.156.143 geobour98@kali:~$ nmap -p- -T4 -v 10.10.156.143 Starting Nmap 7.92 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2022-08-22 21:48 EEST Initiating Ping Scan at 21:48 Scanning 10.
